props.name: type
props.description: Allow one open item (collapsible) or many.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled set of open item values.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open item values.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the new set of open values.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL. Falls back to initials if missing or it fails to load.

props.name: name
props.description: Name — drives initials and the accessible label.

props.name: size
props.description: Size from the scale.

props.name: shape
props.description: Circle (people) or rounded square (orgs/repos).

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color scheme.

props.name: count
props.description: Numeric count; renders max+ overflow.

props.name: max
props.description: Overflow threshold for count.

props.name: dot
props.description: Render a bare status dot (no text).

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic tone. Danger uses role=alert; others role=status.

props.name: title
props.description: Bold lead-in line.

props.name: icon
props.description: Replace the default leading icon.

props.name: hideIcon
props.description: Hide the leading icon.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: When set, renders a dismiss button calling this.

props.name: items
props.description: Ordered trail (root first). Last item is the current page.

props.name: separator
props.description: Separator glyph between items (decorative).

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name for the nav landmark.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the button. Use 'primary' for the single most important action per surface.

props.name: size
props.description: Control height / padding scale.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon rendered before the label.

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Icon rendered after the label.

props.name: block
props.description: Stretch the button to fill the available width.

props.name: children
props.description: Button label.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected date.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial selected date.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the chosen date.

props.name: month
props.description: Controlled visible month.

props.name: defaultMonth
props.description: Uncontrolled initial visible month.

props.name: onMonthChange
props.description: Called when the visible month changes (nav / keyboard paging).

props.name: min
props.description: Earliest selectable day (inclusive).

props.name: max
props.description: Latest selectable day (inclusive).

props.name: weekStartsOn
props.description: First day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP-47 locale for month / weekday formatting.

props.name: variant
props.description: Surface style. 'default' sits on the page; 'muted' is a recessed/secondary surface.

props.name: padding
props.description: Inner padding, from the space scale.

props.name: children
props.description: Card contents.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label rendered next to the box.

props.name: caption
props.description: Optional helper text under the label.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state.

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Uncontrolled initial checked state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the checkbox.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field invalid (sets aria-invalid and a danger border).

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Mixed/partial state (e.g. a parent of partially-checked children).

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions (id, header, accessor?, cell?, align?, sortable?, filterable?).

props.name: data
props.description: The rows to render.

props.name: rowKey
props.description: Stable React key for a row.

props.name: searchable
props.description: Show the global search box.

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the global search box.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional surface title.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional surface subtitle.

props.name: actions
props.description: Actions rendered at the top-right of the toolbar.

props.name: density
props.description: Row height / cell padding scale.

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Message shown when no rows match the active filters.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected date.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial selected date.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the chosen date.

props.name: min
props.description: Earliest selectable day (inclusive).

props.name: max
props.description: Latest selectable day (inclusive).

props.name: weekStartsOn
props.description: First day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP-47 locale for the displayed date + calendar.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Trigger text when no date is selected.

props.name: size
props.description: Control height / font scale.

props.name: block
props.description: Stretch the trigger to fill the available width.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Invalid state (danger border + aria-invalid).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the control.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name — emits a hidden yyyy-mm-dd input.

props.name: required
props.description: Sets aria-required (FormControl wires this).

props.name: id
props.description: Id for the trigger (FormControl sets this automatically).

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the dialog is open.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called on Escape, backdrop click, or the close button.

props.name: title
props.description: Accessible + visible heading.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting description (wired as aria-describedby).

props.name: size
props.description: Width from the scale.

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer actions.

props.name: closeOnBackdrop
props.description: Allow closing by clicking the backdrop.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout direction.

props.name: children
props.description: Optional centered label (horizontal only).

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field required (asterisk on the label + required on the input).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the wrapped field.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Force the invalid state. Otherwise inferred from a Validation with variant='error'.

props.name: id
props.description: Override the generated id shared by the label and field.

props.name: children
props.description: FormControl.Label, a field (TextInput/Textarea/Select), and optional Caption/Validation.

props.name: visuallyHidden
props.description: Hide the label visually but keep it for screen readers.

props.name: variant
props.description: Tone of the message. 'error' also drives the field's invalid state.

props.name: icon
props.description: The icon to render. This is the only visible content, so the button must also have an accessible name.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the button. Use 'primary' for the single most important action per surface.

props.name: size
props.description: Square control size (height = width), mapped to the control-height tokens.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color scheme. Pick by meaning (success/danger/accent), not by raw color.

props.name: size
props.description: Label size.

props.name: children
props.description: Label text.

props.name: muted
props.description: Use the muted foreground color instead of the accent color.

props.name: underline
props.description: When the underline is shown.

props.name: external
props.description: Marks the link as leading off-site: sets target="_blank" + rel="noopener noreferrer" and appends a visually-hidden " (opens in new tab)" warning for screen-reader users.

props.name: trigger
props.description: The trigger element (e.g. a Button); wired with menu aria + click.

props.name: items
props.description: Actions ({ label, onSelect, icon?, disabled?, destructive? }) or { type: 'separator' }.

props.name: align
props.description: Menu alignment relative to the trigger.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name for the menu.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value (null = empty).

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the parsed numeric value (or null when cleared).

props.name: min
props.description: Smallest allowed value (stepping + clamping respect it).

props.name: max
props.description: Largest allowed value (stepping + clamping respect it).

props.name: step
props.description: Increment applied by steppers and arrow keys.

props.name: size
props.description: Control height / font scale.

props.name: block
props.description: Stretch to fill the available width.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Invalid state (danger border + aria-invalid).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the field.

props.name: page
props.description: Current page (1-based).

props.name: pageCount
props.description: Total number of pages.

props.name: onPageChange
props.description: Called with the requested page.

props.name: siblingCount
props.description: Page numbers shown either side of the current page.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name for the nav landmark.

props.name: trigger
props.description: The trigger element (e.g. a Button); cloned with aria-haspopup="dialog", aria-expanded, aria-controls, an onClick toggle, and a focus-restore ref.

props.name: children
props.description: The floating content rendered inside the popover surface.

props.name: placement
props.description: Where the surface is anchored relative to the trigger.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name for the popover dialog.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra class on the wrapper element.

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress, from 0 to max (clamped). Omit for an indeterminate bar.

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound of the scale.

props.name: size
props.description: Track/fill height from the size scale.

props.name: variant
props.description: Fill color, mapped to the matching emphasis token.

props.name: label
props.description: Group label, rendered as a fieldset legend.

props.name: name
props.description: Shared form field name. Auto-generated if omitted.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial selected value.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected value.

props.name: caption
props.description: Optional helper text for the whole group.

props.name: required
props.description: Mark the group required (asterisk on the legend).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable every radio in the group.

props.name: value
props.description: Value submitted when this radio is selected.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label next to the control.

props.name: caption
props.description: Optional helper text under the label.

props.name: options
props.description: The segments ({ value, label, disabled? }).

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected value.

props.name: size
props.description: Control height / font scale.

props.name: block
props.description: Stretch segments to fill the width.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name for the radiogroup (provide one).

props.name: options
props.type: { value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }[]
props.description: The options to choose from.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the newly selected value.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text shown when nothing is selected.

props.name: size
props.description: Control height / font scale.

props.name: block
props.description: Stretch to fill the available width.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Invalid state (danger border + aria-invalid).

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name — emits a hidden input so the value submits with a form.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the control.

props.name: required
props.description: Sets aria-required (FormControl wires this).

props.name: id
props.description: Id for the trigger (FormControl sets this automatically).

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name when not inside a FormControl.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.description: Ids of describing elements (FormControl wires this).

props.name: className
props.description: Extra class on the wrapper. Also accepts native button attrs (data-*, style, onBlur…) via rest.

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape of the placeholder. `text` mimics a line of copy, `rect` a block, `circle` an avatar/icon.

props.name: width
props.description: Width applied inline (number → px, string → as-is, e.g. '60%').

props.name: height
props.description: Height applied inline (number → px, string → as-is). For `circle` it mirrors width.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius token. `circle` always renders as `full` regardless of this prop.

props.name: size
props.description: Size from the scale.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label (visually hidden).

props.name: direction
props.description: Main-axis direction the children are laid out along.

props.name: gap
props.description: Space between children, from the space scale (condensed=8, normal=16, spacious=24). Never use inline pixel gaps.

props.name: align
props.description: Cross-axis alignment (align-items).

props.name: justify
props.description: Main-axis distribution (justify-content).

props.name: wrap
props.description: Allow children to wrap onto multiple lines.

props.name: padding
props.description: Inner padding, from the space scale.

props.name: children
props.description: Stack contents — typically Stack.Item or other components.

props.name: grow
props.description: Grow to fill the available space along the main axis.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label rendered next to the switch.

props.name: caption
props.description: Optional helper text under the label.

props.name: size
props.description: Track / knob scale.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled on/off state.

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Uncontrolled initial state.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Invalid state (danger outline + aria-invalid).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the switch.

props.name: density
props.description: Row height / cell padding scale.

props.name: children
props.description: Table.Head and Table.Body sections.

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment within the header cell.

props.name: sortDirection
props.description: Renders a sort indicator and sets aria-sort. Combine with onClick.

props.name: align
props.description: Text alignment within the cell.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled active tab value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial active tab value.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the active tab changes.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color scheme. Pick by meaning (accent for the active/selected token), not by raw color.

props.name: size
props.description: Tag size.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Optional leading icon rendered before the label; decorative (aria-hidden).

props.name: children
props.description: The tag label content.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: When provided, renders a real remove button. Wire it to drop the tag from your collection. Tag does not remove itself — it has no internal state.

props.name: removeLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the remove button when children is not a plain string. Falls back to the string children, otherwise "Remove".

props.name: size
props.description: Control height / font scale.

props.name: block
props.description: Stretch the field to fill the available width.

props.name: leadingVisual
props.description: Element rendered before the input (e.g. a search icon).

props.name: trailingVisual
props.description: Element rendered after the input.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field as invalid (sets aria-invalid and a danger border).

props.name: block
props.description: Stretch to fill the available width.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Mark the field invalid (sets aria-invalid and a danger border).

props.name: resize
props.description: Which directions the user may resize.

props.name: size
props.description: Padding / font scale — matches TextInput so fields line up in a form.

props.name: rows
props.description: Initial visible number of text lines.

props.name: duration
props.description: ToastProvider: default auto-dismiss (ms); 0 keeps until dismissed.

props.name: placement
props.description: ToastProvider: viewport corner.

props.name: toast
props.description: useToast(): show a toast ({ variant?, title?, message, duration? }); returns its id.

props.name: dismiss
props.description: useToast(): dismiss a toast by id.

props.name: content
props.description: Tooltip text/content.

props.name: placement
props.description: Side of the trigger to render on.

props.name: children
props.description: The single focusable trigger element.
